title: Stuffed yam
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''stuffed yam''' was a dish at the [[Manarai]]. [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] considered this delicious.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{Mo}}

==Sources==
